findings.message: The in ItemBanner has no alt attribute, so screen readers cannot describe the image. This violates WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute (e.g. alt="Items catalogue banner"), or alt="" if the image is purely decorative so assistive tech skips it.
